properties.tree_location: Campus Residential Property (1540 West Wesley Rd)
properties.tree_description: The 41-inch oak tree at 1540 West Wesley Road (A on campus Residential Home) is in decline and has not improved despite repeated maintenance. The canopy is thinning, especially in the upper part of the tree, and there is increasing deadwood and ongoing tip dieback. Over the past three years, the tree has required frequent and heavy pruning, but its condition has continued to get worse.Reason for Removal:Dying treeComments:The tree is tall with large extended limbs, which makes it more exposed to wind and increases the chance of limb failure. Because of its continued decline, larger limbs are more likely to break, especially during storms.
